data.name: ProcessOnPage
data.value: Process on this page (wait for completion)

data.name: SplitLargerOperations
data.value: Split larger operations into multiple batches

data.name: NoEmailsFoundText
data.value: No emails were found for the specified search criteria.

data.name: ExportingFilteredResults
data.value: Exporting filtered results based on your current search criteria.

data.name: ExportingAllEmails
data.value: Exporting all emails from your archive.

data.name: ExportMayTakeTime
data.value: Export may take some time for large numbers of emails. The exported file will contain up to 10,000 emails.

data.name: EmailsMatchCriteria
data.value: {0} emails match your current criteria and will be exported.

data.name: PleaseSelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one email to copy.

data.name: TooManyEmailsSelected
data.value: Too many emails selected ({0}). Maximum allowed is {1} emails. Please reduce your selection or split into multiple operations.

data.name: ContinueWithOperation
data.value: You have selected {0} emails. This will be processed as a background job that you can monitor separately. Continue?

data.name: DeleteAccountConfirm
data.value: Delete account {0} and all archived emails? This cannot be undone!

data.name: DeleteUserConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete user {0}? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: AddFirstUser
data.value: Add your first user to start managing access to the mail archive.

data.name: NoActiveBackgroundJobs
data.value: There are currently no active background jobs.

data.name: AddFirstAccount
data.value: Add your first email account to start archiving emails or import existing MBox files.

data.name: LeaveEmpty
data.value: Leave empty to keep the current password unchanged.

data.name: DisabledAccountsNotSynced
data.value: Disabled accounts will not be synchronized

data.name: LeaveEmptyToDisableAutomaticDeletion
data.value: Leave empty to disable automatic deletion

data.name: AutoDeleteText
data.value: Automatically delete emails from the server after they have been archived for this many days. Leave empty to disable automatic deletion.

data.name: SyncIntervalMinutesInfo
data.value: Overrides the global sync interval for this account. Leave empty to use the default from appsettings.json.

data.name: FullSyncIntervalHoursInfo
data.value: Performs a full resync on this schedule. Leave empty to use the global default from appsettings.json (if set) or to disable automatic full sync. The manual resync button remains available regardless.

data.name: AboutToDeleteAccountAllEmails
data.value: You are about to permanently delete this email account and ALL its archived emails.

data.name: ActionWillFreeStorage
data.value: Will free up database storage space

data.name: ActionWillStopSync
data.value: Will stop all synchronization for this account

data.name: AlternativeDisableInfo
data.value: If you only want to stop email synchronization without losing data, you can disable the account instead.

data.name: UnderstandDeletionAcknowledge
data.value: I understand that this action will permanently delete the account "{0}" and all {1} archived emails. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: CancelKeepAccountMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel? The account will be kept and no changes will be made.

data.name: YouAreAboutToDelete
data.value: You are about to PERMANENTLY DELETE:

data.name: EnterFolderNames
data.value: Enter folder names separated by semicolons, e.g.: Junk;Spam;Trash

data.name: EnterFolderNamesText
data.value: Folders to exclude from synchronization. Enter folder names separated by semicolons.

data.name: FoldersOnServer
data.value: These folders are available on the IMAP server.

data.name: DeletingAccountWillRemoveAllEmails
data.value: Deleting this account will permanently remove all {0} archived emails

data.name: ResetSyncTimeConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset the sync time to current time? This will prevent repeated sync errors from causing incomplete syncs, as the system will only sync emails newer than this timestamp.

data.name: ResetSyncTimeNote
data.value: Note: This resets the sync time to current time. This will prevent repeated sync errors from causing incomplete syncs, as the system will only sync emails newer than this timestamp.

data.name: AutoDeleteEnabledInfo
data.value: Emails will be automatically deleted from the server after being archived for {0} days

data.name: AutoDeleteDisabledInfo
data.value: Emails will not be automatically deleted from the server

data.name: FullResyncConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to perform a full resync? This will compare the entire server content with the archive and may take a long time to complete.

data.name: CopyAllEmailsToAnotherMailbox
data.value: Copy All Emails to Another Mailbox

data.name: DangerZoneInfo
data.value: The following actions are irreversible and will permanently delete data.

data.name: DeleteAccountWithEmailsConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this account and ALL {0} archived emails? This action cannot be undone!

data.name: PstPreserveFolderInformation
data.value: Enable Preserve folder structure to keep Inbox, Sent, etc. separate

data.name: LargeFilesBackground
data.value: Large files will be processed in the background

data.name: DuplicateEmailsSkipped
data.value: Duplicate emails will be automatically skipped

data.name: AllEmailsImported
data.value: All emails will be imported to the specified folder

data.name: ImportBackgroundInfo1
data.value: The import process will run in the background for large files.

data.name: ImportBackgroundInfo2
data.value: You can monitor the progress on the status page after starting the import.

data.name: FileSizeExceedsMax
data.value: File size exceeds maximum allowed size of {0}

data.name: UploadInProgress
data.value: Upload in progress... Please do not close this page until redirected.

data.name: CancelImportConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this import job?

data.name: ImportCompletedWithErrorsDescription
data.value: The import finished but some emails could not be processed. Successfully imported emails are available in your archive. Malformed emails were skipped. Check the logs for details about which emails were affected.

data.name: MoreEmailsThanEstimated
data.value: More emails found than estimated - progress based on file size

data.name: LoginSubtitle
data.value: Please sign in to access the email archive

data.name: AccessDeniedIntro
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: AccessDeniedLoggedInInfo1
data.value: You are logged in, but your account does not have the required permissions to access this page.

data.name: AccessDeniedLoggedInInfo2
data.value: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

data.name: SelectAccountToViewFolders
data.value: Select a mail account first to view available folders.

data.name: CopySingleEmailInfo
data.value: This function copies the archived email to the specified folder of the target account. The email will remain in the archive.

data.name: SelectedEmailsCountMessage
data.value: You have selected {0} emails to copy to a mailbox folder.

data.name: BatchOperationMayTakeTime
data.value: This operation may take some time depending on the number of emails and their sizes.

data.name: CopyMultipleEmailsInfo
data.value: This function copies the selected archived emails to the specified folder of the target account. The emails will remain in the archive.

data.name: CancelJobConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this job?

data.name: JobCompletedSummary
data.value: Processed {0} emails with {1} successful and {2} failed.

data.name: AsyncBatchCopyIntro
data.value: You have selected {0} emails. This operation will run in the background and you can monitor its progress.

data.name: BenefitMonitorRealtime
data.value: You can monitor progress in real-time

data.name: BenefitCanCancel
data.value: Operation can be cancelled if needed

data.name: AsyncBatchCopyWarning
data.value: This operation will copy {0} emails to the selected folder. The operation will run in the background and may take {1} minutes to complete.

data.name: LeaveBlankToKeepPassword
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: NoMailAccountsAssigned
data.value: No mail accounts assigned to this user.

data.name: ErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: DevelopmentModeDetail1
data.value: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: DevelopmentModeDetail2
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications. It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: AdvancedSearchInfo1
data.value: • Use quotes for exact phrases: "important meeting"

data.name: AdvancedSearchInfo2
data.value: • Field-specific search: subject:invoice, from:john, to:domain, body:"important"

data.name: FileTypeCannotBePreviewed
data.value: This file type cannot be previewed. Please download to view.

data.name: PasswordHint
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: CannotRemoveAdmin
data.value: Cannot remove admin rights. At least one admin must exist.

data.name: UserDeleteAdmin
data.value: Cannot delete the last admin user. At least one admin must exist.

data.name: AccountAssignmentSuccess
data.value: Mail account assignments for user '{0}' updated successfully.

data.name: PasswordNotMatch
data.value: New password and confirmation do not match.

data.name: CannotDisableAdmin
data.value: Cannot disable the last admin user. At least one admin must exist.

data.name: EmailAccountError
data.value: Connection to email server could not be established. Please check your settings and ensure the server is reachable.

data.name: EmailAccountEnabled
data.value: Account '{0}' has been enabled for synchronization.

data.name: EmailAccountDisabled
data.value: Account '{0}' has been disabled for synchronization.

data.name: EmailAccountDeleteSuccess
data.value: Email account and {0} related emails have been successfully deleted.

data.name: FullSyncStarted
data.value: Full resync for '{0}' was successfully started.

data.name: MoveEmailsNotFound
data.value: No emails found to copy for this account.

data.name: TooManyEmailsInAccount
data.value: Too many emails in this account ({0:N0}). Maximum allowed is {1:N0} emails per operation. Please use manual selection with smaller batches.

data.name: SelectValidMBoxFile
data.value: Please select a valid MBox file.

data.name: MBoxFileTooLarge
data.value: File size exceeds maximum allowed size of {0}.

data.name: MBoxImportStarted
data.value: MBox file '{0}' uploaded successfully. Import job started with estimated {1:N0} emails.

data.name: MBoxImportCancelled
data.value: MBox import job has been cancelled.

data.name: MBoxImportCancelError
data.value: Could not cancel the MBox import job. The job may have already completed or does not exist.

data.name: SyncTimeResetSuccess
data.value: Sync time has been reset to current time. This will prevent repeated sync errors from causing incomplete syncs, as the system will only sync emails newer than this timestamp.

data.name: SyncTimeUpdatedSuccess
data.value: Sync time has been successfully updated. The system will now sync emails based on the new timestamp.

data.name: EditSyncTimeNote
data.value: Note: This sets the sync time to the specified date and time. The system will only sync emails newer than this timestamp. Use this feature when you need to manually adjust the synchronization point, for example after partial sync failures.

data.name: ImportOnlyAccountDescription
data.value: Account for importing MBox or EML files without IMAP synchronization

data.name: SyncProgressTooltip
data.value: Progress is measured by completed folders. A large folder (e.g. INBOX) keeps the bar at 0% until it finishes.

data.name: SyncStatusTooltip
data.value:
Status codes:
Running = sync in progress
Completed = finished successfully
Failed = ended with errors
Cancelled = stopped by user
Rate Limited = paused due to bandwidth quota

data.name: SyncJobRateLimited
data.value: Sync paused due to bandwidth limit. Will resume automatically.

data.name: AdminRoleDescription
data.value: Full system access including user management and all email accounts

data.name: SelfManagerRoleDescription
data.value: Can manage their own account settings as well as add new Accounts

data.name: SupportedFormatsEml
data.value: Supported formats: ZIP files containing EML files

data.name: EmlFolderStructureInfo
data.value: Folder structure within ZIP will determine target folder for emails

data.name: SupportedFormatsEmlWithMax
data.value: Supported formats: .zip files containing EML files. Maximum size: {0}

data.name: EmlImportFolderInfoDetail
data.value: EML files in the root of the ZIP will be imported to INBOX. EML files in subfolders will be imported to folders with the same name as the subfolder.

data.name: SelectValidEmlFile
data.value: Please select a valid EML file (ZIP format).

data.name: EmlFileTooLarge
data.value: File size exceeds maximum allowed size of {0}.

data.name: EmlImportStarted
data.value: EML file '{0}' uploaded successfully. Import job started with estimated {1:N0} emails.

data.name: EmlImportCancelled
data.value: EML import job has been cancelled.

data.name: EmlImportCancelError
data.value: Could not cancel the EML import job. The job may have already completed or does not exist.

data.name: LeaveEmptyToKeepCurrent
data.value: Leave empty to keep current value

data.name: TwoFactorEnabledSuccess
data.value: Two-factor authentication has been successfully enabled.

data.name: TwoFactorEnableFail
data.value: Failed to enable two-factor authentication. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFactorDisabledSuccess
data.value: Two-factor authentication has been successfully disabled.

data.name: TwoFactorDisableFail
data.value: Failed to disable two-factor authentication. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFactorTokenInvalid
data.value: Invalid authentication code. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFactorSecretMissing
data.value: Two-factor secret is missing. Please restart the setup process.

data.name: TwoFactorNotEnabled
data.value: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this account.

data.name: TwoFactorSessionExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: PasswordIncorrect
data.value: The password you entered is incorrect.

data.name: TwoFactorResetSuccess
data.value: Two-factor authentication has been successfully reset for user {0}.

data.name: TwoFactorResetFail
data.value: Failed to reset two-factor authentication for user {0}.

data.name: TwoFactorSetupInstructions
data.value: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app or enter the secret manually.

data.name: UseAuthenticatorApp
data.value: Use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy to scan the QR code.

data.name: OrEnterManually
data.value: Or enter this secret manually in your authenticator app:

data.name: BackupCodesDescription
data.value: Store these backup codes in a safe place. You can use them to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app.

data.name: BackupCodesWarning
data.value: Each backup code can only be used once. After using a code, it will be invalidated.

data.name: EnterTwoFactorCode
data.value: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a backup code

data.name: EnterTotpOrBackupCode
data.value: Enter a 6-digit TOTP code from your authenticator app or a 16-character backup code

data.name: DisableTwoFactorConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will reduce the security of your account.

data.name: DisableTwoFactorDescription
data.value: To disable two-factor authentication, please enter your password below.

data.name: ScanQRCodeDescription
data.value: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app to set up two-factor authentication.

data.name: ManualEntryDescription
data.value: If you can't scan the QR code, enter this secret manually in your authenticator app:

data.name: EnterCodeDescription
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify and enable two-factor authentication.

data.name: BackupCodesFileHeader
data.value: Mail Archiver - Two-Factor Authentication Backup Codes. Store these backup codes in a safe place. You can use them to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each backup code can only be used once. After using a code, it will be invalidated.

data.name: BackupCodesFileFooter
data.value: Important: Keep these codes secure and do not share them with anyone.

data.name: BackupCodesOneTimeOnly
data.value: These backup codes are for one-time use only. After using a code, it will be invalidated.

data.name: EnterCodeFromApp
data.value: Enter the code from your authenticator app

data.name: DeleteEmailConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this email? This action cannot be undone and will be logged for audit purposes.

data.name: DeleteSelectedEmailsConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {0} selected email(s)? This action cannot be undone and each deletion will be logged for audit purposes.

data.name: RateLimitExceeded
data.value: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

data.name: LoginBlockedMessage
data.value: Too many failed login attempts detected

data.name: LoginBlockedInfo
data.value: For security reasons, login attempts from your IP address have been temporarily blocked due to multiple failed authentication attempts. Please wait 10 minutes before trying again.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 10 characters long

data.name: PasswordRequiresUppercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

data.name: PasswordRequiresLowercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

data.name: PasswordRequiresNumber
data.value: Password must contain at least one number

data.name: PasswordRequiresSpecialChar
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character

data.name: PasswordMustBeDifferent
data.value: New password must be different from the current password

data.name: PasswordChangeRequiredMessage
data.value: For security reasons, you must change your password before continuing. This is required because you are using the default system credentials on a newly set up system.

data.name: PasswordChangeRequiredInfo
data.value: Your new password must be different from the current password and meet all security requirements.

data.name: CannotLeavePasswordChange
data.value: You must change your password before you can continue using the system.

data.name: TwoFactorEnabled
data.value: Two-factor authentication is currently enabled for this user.

data.name: ConfirmResetTwoFactor
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset two-factor authentication for this user? They will need to set it up again.

data.name: TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts. Please wait {0} seconds before trying again.

data.name: RateLimitTwoFactorMessage
data.value: You have made too many 2FA verification attempts. Please wait and try again later.

data.name: ExportAccountDescription
data.value: Export all emails from this account to downloadable files

data.name: ExportAccountInfoDetail
data.value: Export all emails from this mail account. Depending on the selected format, you will receive a ZIP file containing all emails.

data.name: ExportFormatEMLDescription
data.value: Creates a ZIP file with separate folders containing individual .eml files

data.name: ExportFormatMBoxDescription
data.value: Creates a ZIP file with .mbox files containing all emails

data.name: ExportJobStarted
data.value: Export job started for account '{0}'. You will be redirected to the status page.

data.name: ExportJobCancelError
data.value: Could not cancel the export job. The job may have already completed or does not exist.

data.name: ExportDownloadNotReady
data.value: Export download is not ready yet. Please wait for the export to complete.

data.name: ExportFileNotFound
data.value: Export file not found. The file may have been cleaned up or the export failed.

data.name: ExportStarted
data.value: Export job started for account '{0}'. You will be redirected to the status page.

data.name: ExportCancelError
data.value: Could not cancel the export job. The job may have already completed or does not exist.

data.name: NoEmailsToExport
data.value: No emails available for export in this account.

data.name: ExportInfoText
data.value: This export will create a downloadable ZIP file containing all emails from this account. The format you choose determines how the emails are organized.

data.name: EMLFormatDescription
data.value: Creates individual .eml files organized in folders.

data.name: MBoxFormatDescription
data.value: Creates traditional mailbox files containing all emails in a single file per folder.

data.name: ExportWarningTime
data.value: Large accounts may take several minutes to export and will run in the background

data.name: ExportWarningSize
data.value: The resulting ZIP file may be quite large depending on email volume and attachments

data.name: ExportWarningCleanup
data.value: Export files are automatically deleted after download or after 7 days

data.name: ConfirmExport
data.value: Are you sure you want to start the export? This will process all emails in this account.

data.name: ExportFormatSelectionInfo
data.value: Choose the format for your email export. Each format has different advantages depending on your needs.

data.name: ExportSelectedInfo
data.value: The export will run in the background and you will be able to download the result from the Jobs page once completed.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportComplete
data.value: Selected emails export completed successfully. {0} emails were exported.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportFailed
data.value: Selected emails export failed. Please check the logs for more details.

data.name: NoAccessToEmail
data.value: You do not have access to this email.

data.name: EmailNotFound
data.value: The email could not be found.

data.name: EmailCopiedSuccessfully
data.value: The email has been successfully copied to the specified folder.

data.name: EmailCopyFailed
data.value: The email could not be copied to the specified folder. Please check the logs.

data.name: NoEmailsSelectedForBatch
data.value: No emails selected for batch operation.

data.name: NoEmailsCopiedCheckLogs
data.value: None of the selected emails could be copied. Please check the logs for details.

data.name: NoEmailsFoundForAccount
data.value: No emails found to copy for this account.

data.name: TooManyEmailsToProcess
data.value: Too many emails to process. Please try with a smaller selection.

data.name: TooManyEmailsSelectFewer
data.value: Too many emails selected. Please select fewer emails and try again.

data.name: AsyncBatchRestoreNotAvailable
data.value: Asynchronous batch restore is not available.

data.name: BatchRestoreServiceNotAvailable
data.value: Batch restore service is not available.

data.name: BatchRestoreJobCancelled
data.value: Batch restore job has been cancelled.

data.name: CouldNotCancelBatchRestoreJob
data.value: Could not cancel the batch restore job.

data.name: SyncJobServiceNotAvailable
data.value: Sync job service is not available.

data.name: CouldNotCancelSyncJob
data.value: Could not cancel the sync job.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportServiceNotAvailable
data.value: Selected emails export service is not available.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportJobNotFound
data.value: Selected emails export job not found.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportJobCancelled
data.value: Selected emails export job has been cancelled.

data.name: CouldNotCancelSelectedEmailsExportJob
data.value: Could not cancel the selected emails export job.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportNotCompleted
data.value: Selected emails export job is not completed yet or has already been downloaded.

data.name: ExportParametersInvalid
data.value: Export parameters are invalid. Please try again.

data.name: NoAccessToSelectedAccount
data.value: You do not have access to the selected account.

data.name: SelectedEmailsExportNotAvailable
data.value: Selected emails export is not available.

data.name: NoAccessToSelectedEmails
data.value: You do not have access to any of the selected emails.

data.name: TooManyEmailsSelectedWithLimits
data.value: Too many emails selected ({0:N0}). Maximum allowed is {1:N0} emails per operation.

data.name: TooManyEmailsForDirectProcessing
data.value: Too many emails selected for direct processing ({0:N0}). Maximum for direct processing is {1:N0} emails.

data.name: AllEmailsCopiedSuccessfully
data.value: All {0} emails have been successfully copied to the specified folder.

data.name: EmailsCopiedWithSomeFailures
data.value: {0} emails have been copied, but {1} could not be copied. Check the logs for details.

data.name: TooManyEmailsInAccountWithLimits
data.value: Too many emails in this account ({0:N0}). Maximum allowed is {1:N0} emails per operation.

data.name: BatchRestoreJobStartedWithDetails
data.value: Batch restore job started with {0:N0} emails. Job ID: {1}

data.name: ExportJobStartedWithDetails
data.value: Export job started with {0:N0} emails in {1} format. Job ID: {2}

data.name: EmailNotFoundMessage
data.value: The email you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

data.name: EmailNotFoundHelp
data.value: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

data.name: LocalRetentionRequiresServerRetention
data.value: Local retention can only be set if server retention ('Delete After Days') is also configured.

data.name: LocalRetentionMustBeGreaterOrEqual
data.value: Local retention days must be greater than or equal to delete after days to ensure emails are not deleted from the local archive before they are deleted from the mail server.

data.name: LocalRetentionInfo
data.value: Number of days after which emails are deleted from the local archive. Leave empty to keep emails indefinitely. Must be greater than or equal to 'Delete After Days' if both are set.

data.name: CouldNotLoadFolders
data.value: Could not load folders from server

data.name: EmailLockedDescription
data.value: This email is locked and its content integrity is protected by a cryptographic hash

data.name: IntegrityValidDescription
data.value: The email content has not been modified. The current hash matches the stored hash.

data.name: IntegrityViolationDescription
data.value: WARNING: The current hash does not match the stored hash. The email content may have been tampered with.

data.name: LockedEmail
data.value: Locked email - content protected for compliance

data.name: UseExistingCredentialsPrompt
data.value: Other Microsoft 365 accounts from this domain already exist. You can copy their credentials to save time.

data.name: ApplyToAllDomainAccountsPrompt
data.value: You have modified the Microsoft 365 credentials. Would you like to apply these changes to all other accounts from the same domain?

data.name: ApplyToAllAccounts
data.value: Apply to all accounts in this domain

data.name: PleaseWaitRedirectingToProvider
data.value: Please wait while we redirect you to {0}...

data.name: OidcUserCannotHavePassword
data.value: OIDC users cannot have a password. They authenticate through the OIDC provider.

data.name: OidcUserCannotChangeUsername
data.value: OIDC user usernames cannot be changed as they are linked to the OIDC provider identity.

data.name: OidcUserCannotChangePassword
data.value: OIDC users cannot change their password. Password management is handled by your OIDC provider.

data.name: OidcAccountAlreadyExists
data.value: An account with this email already exists. Please contact your administrator to remove or modify the existing local account before using OIDC authentication.

data.name: OidcAccountPendingApproval
data.value: Your account is pending admin approval. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: OidcAccountDeactivated
data.value: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: OidcInvalidEmailFormat
data.value: Invalid email format received from identity provider

data.name: OidcClaimLengthExceeded
data.value: Claim values exceed maximum allowed length

data.name: AccountDeletionQueued
data.value: Deletion of account '{0}' has been queued and will be processed in the background.

data.name: DeletionCancelError
data.value: Could not cancel the deletion job. The job may have already completed or does not exist.

data.name: AccountDeleted
data.value: Account '{0}' has been successfully deleted along with all archived emails and attachments.

data.name: CancelDeletionConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this deletion job? If the deletion has already started, some data may have already been removed.

data.name: ConfirmCancelEmailDeletion
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this email deletion job?

data.name: EnterFolderNameOrSelect
data.value: Enter a new folder name or select an existing one. The folder will be created automatically during import.

data.name: FallbackFolderHelpText
data.value: Used when Preserve folder structure is disabled, or for root-level messages.

data.name: PreserveFolderStructureLabel
data.value: Preserve folder structure (Inbox, Sent Items, Drafts, etc.)

data.name: PreserveFolderStructureImportHelp
data.value: When enabled, each PST folder is imported into the matching archive folder. When disabled, all emails go into the selected fallback folder.

data.name: PstImportWarningText
data.value: The import runs as a background job. Large PST files may take several hours. Calendar entries, contacts, and tasks are automatically skipped — only email messages are imported.

data.name: ManualSyncTooltip
data.value: Manual sync - account is disabled for automatic synchronization

data.name: PreserveFolderStructureHelp
data.value: Restores emails to subfolders matching their original folder structure under the selected target folder.

data.name: DuplicatesSkippedSummary
data.value: {0} emails were skipped because they already exist in the target account.

data.name: MsaStep1OpenBrowser
data.value: 1. Open in a browser (or smartphone etc.):

data.name: MsaDefaultClientInfoCreate
data.value: Mail-Archiver uses a pre-configured app registration. Enter email address, save, then click {0}.

data.name: MsaAppRegistrationSetup
data.value: Set up Azure App Registration (one-time, ~2 minutes)

data.name: MsaAppRegStepAccountTypes
data.value: Under Supported account types select: Accounts in any organizational directory and personal Microsoft accounts

data.name: MsaAppRegStepRedirect
data.value: Leave Redirect URI blank → click Register

data.name: MsaAppRegStepClientId
data.value: Enter the displayed Application (client) ID below

data.name: MsaAppRegStepAuth
data.value: Click Authentication in the app → enable Allow public client flows → Save

data.name: MsaNoSecretNeededCreate
data.value: No secret, no redirect URI required. After saving, click Authorize.

data.name: MsaClientSecretPlaceholder
data.value: Not required for public client apps

data.name: MsaClientSecretHint
data.value: Only needed for confidential client apps. Leave blank when using a public client.

data.name: MsaAuthorized
data.value: Authorized. Microsoft account connected, token is renewed automatically.

data.name: MsaEnterClientIdThenAuthorize
data.value: Enter Client ID, save, then click {0}.

data.name: MsaDefaultClientInfoEdit
data.value: Mail-Archiver uses a pre-configured app registration — own app registration is not required. Fill in only to use a custom Client ID.

data.name: MsaNoSecretNeededShort
data.value: No secret, no redirect URI required.

data.name: MsaClientIdOptionalHint
data.value: Optional — leave blank to use the default app registration.

data.name: MsaClientIdKeepExisting
data.value: Leave blank to keep existing value.

data.name: MsaClientSecretPlaceholderEdit
data.value: Not required for Device Code Flow

data.name: MsaClientIdRequired
data.value: A Client ID is required for MS Personal accounts when no default Client ID is configured.

data.name: MsaNotAuthorizedSync
data.value: This Microsoft account is not yet authorized. Please click "Authorize with Microsoft" on the account's edit page first.

data.name: MsaClientIdNotConfigured
data.value: Client ID is not configured. Please edit the account first.

data.name: MsaSessionExpired
data.value: Session expired. Please start authorization again.

data.name: UseTenantImportHelp
data.value: Loads the tenant mailboxes and creates accounts with the naming scheme: entered name - <mailbox@example.com>.

data.name: ImportAllListedMailboxesHelp
data.value: When disabled, only the mailboxes selected below are imported.

data.name: NoEnabledM365UsersFound
data.value: No enabled M365 users with an email address or user principal name were found in this tenant.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneMailboxOrImportAll
data.value: Select at least one mailbox or enable importing all listed mailboxes.

data.name: AllSelectedM365TenantMailboxesAlreadyExist
data.value: All {0} selected M365 tenant mailboxes already exist.

data.name: ImportedM365TenantAccounts
data.value: Imported {0} M365 tenant mail accounts. Skipped {1} existing accounts.

data.name: M365TenantCredentialsRequired
data.value: Client ID, client secret and tenant ID are required to list tenant mailboxes.

data.name: M365TenantMailboxesCouldNotBeListed
data.value: Tenant mailboxes could not be listed. Please check the M365 credentials and permissions.

data.name: M365TenantAccountsCouldNotBeImported
data.value: The M365 tenant accounts could not be imported. Please check the credentials and permissions.

data.name: LoadMailboxesHelp
data.value: Load the list of tenant mailboxes to choose which accounts to import.

data.name: ClientSecretWillBeCopiedOnSave
data.value: Client secret will be copied from the selected existing account on save.

data.name: ClientSecretRequired
data.value: Client Secret is required for M365 accounts

data.name: TenantManagementHelp
data.value: Add missing mailboxes from this tenant. New accounts use the credentials of the source account.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneMailboxForManagement
data.value: Select at least one mailbox to add.

data.name: AccountNameTooLong
data.value: Account name must be at most 200 characters.

data.name: SelectAtMostMailboxes
data.value: Select at most {0} mailboxes at once.

data.name: RenameExistingAccountsHelp
data.value: Apply the naming scheme to all M365 accounts using the same app registration after saving.

data.name: UnsavedChangesWarning
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page?

data.name: CopyFolderToExcluded
data.value: Click a folder to add or remove it from the exclusion list

data.name: MsaAuthAfterSaveInfo
data.value: After saving, you will be redirected to Microsoft to authorize access to your mailbox.

data.name: OidcPasswordManagedExternally
data.value: This is an OIDC user. Password management is handled by the OIDC provider.

data.name: CsvImportInformation
data.value: Import multiple IMAP mailboxes at once via a CSV file.

data.name: CsvImportFormatHelp
data.value: Columns: email (required), password (required), name (optional), username (optional), imap_server (optional), imap_port (optional), use_ssl (optional)

data.name: CsvImportCommonServerHelp
data.value: Common server settings apply to all rows without an imap_server column.

data.name: CsvImportNoConnectionTest
data.value: No IMAP connection test is performed — errors will only appear on first sync.

data.name: CsvImportAdminOnlyNote
data.value: This feature is available to administrators only.

data.name: CsvFileHelp
data.value: UTF-8 encoded CSV file with header row. Required columns: email, password.

data.name: CommonServerSettingsHelp
data.value: Used when the CSV row has no imap_server value.

data.name: SkipExistingHelp
data.value: Duplicates are skipped, not marked as errors.

data.name: CsvImportFileTooLarge
data.value: File too large: {0} MB, maximum is {1} MB.

data.name: CsvImportNoValidRows
data.value: No valid mailboxes found in the CSV file.

data.name: CsvImportTooManyRows
data.value: CSV file contains {0} rows, maximum is {1}.

data.name: CsvImportMissingServer
data.value: No IMAP server provided (neither in the row nor in the form).

data.name: CsvImportMalformedLine
data.value: Malformed CSV line — could not be parsed.

data.name: CsvImportCouldNotBeProcessed
data.value: CSV import could not be processed

data.name: CsvImportAdminOnly
data.value: CSV bulk import is available to administrators only.
